query: SELECT b.id as booking_id, b.status as booking_status, b.meetLink as booking_meetLink, a.id as slot_id, a.meetLink as slot_meetLink, a.status as slot_status, a.startTime, a.endTime, a.title FROM bookings b JOIN availabilitySlots a ON b.slotId = a.id WHERE b.id = 210001;
